text:
MARS+DRAGON HEAD
+VENUS ... Husband will be a fortune one, but
often faces troubles, and has career
connected with CHAYA (shadow,
photography, computers), career
pertaining to-wheels also indicated.
Before marriage, husband faces
endangering situations, and nature of
husband not amiable to wife
MARS+DRAGON TAIL
+VENUS ... Her husband's nature will not be
suitable to the native,
disappointments prevails in family
life, litigations indicated. Poor
knowledge of husband not
beneficial.
EDUCATION
MEROJRY-!SUN+VENUS ... Education connecting silk,
agencies, and business aspects.
MARCURY+ MOON+
VENUS ... Knowledge connecting bank, or land
house purchasing/selling, arts,
architecture, hotels etc.
MERCURY+ MARS+
VENUS ... Arithmetic, accounts and agency
type.
MERCURY+JUPITER+
VENUS ... Hidden treasure of knowledge,
intellectual guide, knowledge in
M.B.A.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 51
MERCURY +SATURN+
VENUS .. . Business Management, commercial
lines.
MERCURY+SATURN+
